rules.title: Final interpretation right
rules.pattern: (最终解释权归.{0,20}(甲方|本公司|乙方|平台).{0,10}所有)
rules.explanation: A unilateral final-interpretation clause can create imbalance and should be reviewed carefully.
rules.suggestion: Replace with a dispute-resolution or amendment mechanism rather than unilateral interpretation rights.

rules.title: Unilateral modification power
rules.pattern: (甲方有权单方(修改|变更|调整|决定)|平台有权单方(修改|变更|调整|决定))
rules.explanation: Broad unilateral change authority is a common red flag in commercial contracts.
rules.suggestion: Add notice period, negotiation rights, and written confirmation requirements before changes take effect.

rules.title: Automatic renewal
rules.pattern: (自动续期|自动续约|默认续费|到期后自动延长)
rules.explanation: Auto-renewal clauses should be explicit, understandable, and operationally controllable.
rules.suggestion: Add reminder timing, cancellation path, and renewal notice language.

rules.title: No-refund clause
rules.pattern: (已付款项概不退还|不予退还|一律不退款|已支付费用不退)
rules.explanation: Flat no-refund language can be risky when the contract lacks balanced service, breach, or cancellation logic.
rules.suggestion: Define refund triggers, service milestones, and mutual breach handling more precisely.

rules.title: Unlimited or total liability shift
rules.pattern: (承担全部损失|无限责任|全部赔偿责任|对一切损失负责)
rules.explanation: Unlimited or blanket liability is a major negotiation point and often needs specialist review.
rules.suggestion: Cap liability and define scope, exclusions, and direct-vs-indirect damages clearly.

rules.title: Broad exemption from responsibility
rules.pattern: (甲方不承担任何责任|平台不承担任何责任|概不负责|免责)
rules.explanation: Broad免责 language can be overreaching if it is not narrowed by scenario and legal limits.
rules.suggestion: Narrow the exemption to specific events and add each party's baseline obligations.

rules.title: Unilateral termination right
rules.pattern: (甲方可随时解除|平台可随时终止|乙方不得解除|未经甲方同意不得解除)
rules.explanation: One-sided termination rights can materially change commercial risk allocation.
rules.suggestion: Define reciprocal termination triggers, cure periods, and post-termination settlement rules.

rules.title: Unfavorable jurisdiction clause
rules.pattern: (由甲方所在地法院管辖|由平台所在地法院管辖|提交.{0,10}(仲裁委员会|法院)处理)
rules.explanation: Jurisdiction clauses may be valid, but they should be reviewed for cost, convenience, and bargaining balance.
rules.suggestion: Review venue, governing law, and evidence rules before signing.

rules.title: Acceptance controlled by one side
rules.pattern: (以甲方最终验收为准|验收标准以甲方要求为准|是否合格由甲方决定)
rules.explanation: If one side fully controls acceptance, payment and delivery disputes become more likely.
rules.suggestion: Define objective acceptance criteria, timelines, and deemed-acceptance rules.

rules.title: Broad IP ownership transfer
rules.pattern: (所有成果及知识产权归甲方所有|全部知识产权永久归甲方|乙方无权保留任何知识产权)
rules.explanation: IP ownership can be commercially acceptable, but broad transfer language should be reviewed against price and scope.
rules.suggestion: Separate pre-existing IP, deliverable IP, usage license, and derivative rights.

rules.title: Asymmetric breach penalty
rules.pattern: (乙方应支付违约金|乙方承担违约责任).{0,40}(甲方无需承担|甲方不承担)
rules.explanation: Highly asymmetric breach language can indicate an unfair risk split.
rules.suggestion: Make breach remedies reciprocal or justify differences with clear business logic.
